raw_consumer_statement: It's very simple, when purchasing an airline  ticket that includes bags, the legal contract involves delivering the bags to the destination without destroying, losing or stealing them. If the bags are not delivered intact, the contract is not completed, the payment is not due. I have been illegally billed for a situation where my bags were destroyed and I was not properly compensated for the value of the destroyed property under international law. This is fraud. It is illegal.
